title: eriochloa subglabra
intro: Eriochloa subglabra, also known as desert hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eriochloa subglabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain bacterial infections. In traditional herbal preparations, Eriochloa subglabra is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
